Kql: datatable(s:string, num:int)[ "match123",123, "nomatch",456 ] | where s startswith "match" and num between (100 .. 200) | search "match*" | project s, num
Sql: SELECT s, num FROM (SELECT 'search_arg0' AS "$table", * FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('match123', 123), ('nomatch', 456)) AS t(s, num) WHERE s ILIKE 'match%' AND num BETWEEN 100 AND 200) WHERE (REGEXP_MATCHES(LOWER(CAST(s AS VARCHAR)), '(^|[^A-Za-z0-9])match\*([^A-Za-z0-9]|$)') OR REGEXP_MATCHES(LOWER(CAST(num AS VARCHAR)), '(^|[^A-Za-z0-9])match\*([^A-Za-z0-9]|$)')))

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "café résumé","cafe resume","CAFÉ RÉSUMÉ","Café Résumé" ] | where s has "café" | project s, eq = s =~ "café résumé"
Sql: SELECT s, UPPER(s) = UPPER('café résumé') AS eq FROM (VALUES ('café résumé'), ('cafe resume'), ('CAFÉ RÉSUMÉ'), ('Café Résumé')) AS t(s) WHERE regexp_matches(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '(?i)\bcafé\b')
KSample: ('café résumé', True) || ('CAFÉ RÉSUMÉ', True) || ('Café Résumé', True)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "Hello\tWorld","Hello World","Hello\nWorld" ] | where s has "Hello" and s has "World" | project s, sp = s contains " "
Sql: SELECT s, s ILIKE '% %' AS sp FROM (VALUES ('Hello\tWorld'), ('Hello World'), ('Hello\nWorld')) AS t(s) WHERE regexp_matches(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '(?i)\bHello\b') AND regexp_matches(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '(?i)\bWorld\b')
KSample:
('Hello	World', False) || ('Hello World', True) || ('Hello
World', False)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "key:\"val\"","key:'val'","key:val" ] | project s, ext=extract(@"key:.?(\w+)",1,s), cnt=countof(s,"val")
Sql: SELECT s, REGEXP_EXTRACT(s, '@"key:.?(\w+)', 1) AS ext, (LENGTH(s) - LENGTH(REPLACE(s, 'val', ''))) / LENGTH('val') AS cnt FROM (VALUES ('key:\"val\'), ('key:''val'), ('key:val')) AS t(s)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "a''b","a'b'c","'start","end'","''" ] | project s, c=countof(s,"'"), i=indexof(s,"'"), i2=indexof(s,"'",2)
Sql: SELECT s, (LENGTH(s) - LENGTH(REPLACE(s, '', ''))) / LENGTH('') AS c, (INSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '') - 1) AS i, (INSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '') - 1) AS i2 FROM (VALUES ('a''''b'), ('a''b''c'), ('start'), ('end'), ('')) AS t(s)
Detail: first differing row[0]: kusto=('a''b', 2, 1, 2) duck=('a''b', NaN, 0, 0)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "back\\slash","double\\\\slash","none" ] | project s, len=strlen(s), idx=indexof(s,"\\"), cnt=countof(s,@"\\")
Sql: SELECT s, LENGTH(CAST(s AS VARCHAR)) AS len, (INSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '\\') - 1) AS idx, (LENGTH(s) - LENGTH(REPLACE(s, '@"\\', ''))) / LENGTH('@"\\') AS cnt FROM (VALUES ('back\\slash'), ('double\\\\slash'), ('none')) AS t(s)

datatable(s:string)[ "line1
line2
line3","one
two","solo" ] | project s, parts=split(s,"
"), n=array_length(split(s,"
"))
Sql:
SELECT s, STRING_SPLIT(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '
') AS parts, LEN(STRING_SPLIT(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '
')) AS n FROM (VALUES ('line1
line2
line3'), ('one
two'), ('solo')) AS t(s)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "a,b,,c,","",",",",," ] | project s, n=array_length(split(s,",")), p_last=split(s,",")[3]
Sql: SELECT s, LEN(STRING_SPLIT(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), ',')) AS n, STRING_SPLIT(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), ',')[3 + 1] AS p_last FROM (VALUES ('a,b,,c,'), (''), (','), (',,')) AS t(s)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "one two three","wordword","   " ] | project s, rr=replace_regex(s,@"\s+","-"), rr2=replace_regex(s,@"(\w)(\w)",@"\2\1")
Sql: SELECT s, REGEXP_REPLACE(s, '@"\s+', '-') AS rr, REGEXP_REPLACE(s, '@"(\w)(\w)', '@"\2\1') AS rr2 FROM (VALUES ('one two three'), ('wordword'), ('   ')) AS t(s)
Detail: first differing row[0]: kusto=('one two three', 'one-two-three', 'noe wto htere') duck=('one two three', 'one two three', 'one two three')
DSample: ('one two three', 'one two three', 'one two three') || ('wordword', 'wordword', 'wordword') || ('   ', '   ', '   ')

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "2020-01-02 03:04","a1b2c3d4","nope" ] | project s, all=extract_all(@"(\d+)",s), all2=extract_all(@"(\d)(\d)",dynamic([1,2]),s)
Sql: SELECT s, REGEXP_EXTRACT_ALL(s, '@"(\d+)') AS "all", LIST_TRANSFORM(range(1, GREATEST(LEN(REGEXP_EXTRACT_ALL(s, '@"(\d)(\d)', 1)), LEN(REGEXP_EXTRACT_ALL(s, '@"(\d)(\d)', 2))) + 1), lambda i: [REGEXP_EXTRACT_ALL(s, '@"(\d)(\d)', 1)[i], REGEXP_EXTRACT_ALL(s, '@"(\d)(\d)', 2)[i]]) AS all2 FROM (VALUES ('2020-01-02 03:04'), ('a1b2c3d4'), ('nope')) AS t(s)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "hello","HELLO","Hello" ] | project s, sub_neg=substring(s,-3,2), sub_negstart=substring(s,-100,3), sub_zerolen=substring(s,2,0)
Sql: SELECT s, SUBSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), ((-3)) + 1, 2) AS sub_neg, SUBSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), ((-100)) + 1, 3) AS sub_negstart, SUBSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), (2) + 1, 0) AS sub_zerolen FROM (VALUES ('hello'), ('HELLO'), ('Hello')) AS t(s)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "abcdef","xy","" ] | project s, sm1=substring(s,3), sm2=substring(s,-2), sm3=substring(s,100)
Sql: SELECT s, SUBSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), (3) + 1) AS sm1, SUBSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), ((-2)) + 1) AS sm2, SUBSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), (100) + 1) AS sm3 FROM (VALUES ('abcdef'), ('xy'), ('')) AS t(s)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "  pad  ","\t\tx\t\t","yyy","" ] | project s, t=trim(@"\s",s), ts=trim(" ",s), tcustom=trim("y",s)
Sql: SELECT s, TRIM(s, '@"\s') AS t, TRIM(s, ' ') AS ts, TRIM(s, 'y') AS tcustom FROM (VALUES ('  pad  '), ('\t\tx\t\t'), ('yyy'), ('')) AS t(s)
Detail: first differing row[0]: kusto=('  pad  ', ' pad ', ' pad ', '  pad  ') duck=('  pad  ', '  pad  ', 'pad', '  pad  ')

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "xxhelloxx","__world__","midxxmid" ] | project s, ts=trim_start("x",s), te=trim_end("_",s), full=trim(@"[x_]",s)
Sql: SELECT s, LTRIM(s, 'x') AS ts, RTRIM(s, '_') AS te, TRIM(s, '@"[x_]') AS "full" FROM (VALUES ('xxhelloxx'), ('__world__'), ('midxxmid')) AS t(s)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "100%done","50% off","%start","end%" ] | where s contains "%" | project s, e=extract(@"(\d+)%",1,s)
Sql: SELECT s, REGEXP_EXTRACT(s, '@"(\d+)%', 1) AS e FROM (VALUES ('100%done'), ('50% off'), ('%start'), ('end%')) AS t(s) WHERE s ILIKE '%%%'

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "a_b","a%b","a\\b","a[b]" ] | where s contains "%" or s contains "_" | project s
Sql: SELECT s FROM (VALUES ('a_b'), ('a%b'), ('a\\b'), ('a[b]')) AS t(s) WHERE s ILIKE '%%%' OR s ILIKE '%_%'

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "Привет мир","ПРИВЕТ","привет","МИР" ] | where s has "мир" or s has_cs "ПРИВЕТ" | project s, up=toupper(s), lo=tolower(s)
Sql: SELECT s, UPPER(s) AS up, LOWER(s) AS lo FROM (VALUES ('Привет мир'), ('ПРИВЕТ'), ('привет'), ('МИР')) AS t(s) WHERE regexp_matches(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '(?i)\bмир\b') OR regexp_matches(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '\bПРИВЕТ\b')

SELECT *, (((l) % NULLIF(7, 0)) + ABS(7)) % NULLIF(7, 0) AS m, CAST(TRUNC(CAST(l AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(7, 0)) AS BIGINT) AS d, (CAST(TRUNC(CAST(l AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(7, 0)) AS BIGINT)) * 7 + ((((l) % NULLIF(7, 0)) + ABS(7)) % NULLIF(7, 0)) AS recon, ((CAST(TRUNC(CAST(l AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(7, 0)) AS BIGINT)) * 7 + ((((l) % NULLIF(7, 0)) + ABS(7)) % NULLIF(7, 0))) = l AS eq FROM (VALUES (CAST(-9223372036854775807 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(-100 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(0 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(100 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(9223372036854775807 AS BIGINT))) AS t(l)

Kql: print h1 = toint("0x7FFFFFFF"), h2 = tolong("0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF"), h3 = toint("0X1f"), h4 = tolong("0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF"), h5 = toint("-0x10")
Sql: SELECT TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST('0x7FFFFFFF' AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST('0x7FFFFFFF' AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS h1, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST('0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF' AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST('0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF' AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS BIGINT) AS h2, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST('0X1f' AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST('0X1f' AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS h3, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST('0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF' AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST('0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF' AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS BIGINT) AS h4, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST('-0x10' AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST('-0x10' AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS h5
Detail: first differing row[0]: kusto=(2147483647, 9223372036854775807, 31, -1, null) duck=(null, null, null, null, null)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "1.5e3", "1.5E3", "1.5e+3", "1.5e-3", ".5", "5.", "+.5", "1_000", "0b11", "1d" ] | extend td = todouble(s), ti = toint(s), tl = tolong(s)
Sql: SELECT *, COALESCE(TRY_CAST(s AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(s AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE)) AS td, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(s AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(s AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS ti, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(s AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(s AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS BIGINT) AS tl FROM (VALUES ('1.5e3'), ('1.5E3'), ('1.5e+3'), ('1.5e-3'), ('.5'), ('5.'), ('+.5'), ('1_000'), ('0b11'), ('1d')) AS t(s)
Detail: first differing row[0]: kusto=('1.5e3', 1500, null, null) duck=('1.5e3', 1500, 1500, 1500)
